# Tests the merge driver invoked automatically by git using a globally installed
# 'gomodmerge' binary. The driver is registered in the global git config
# (isolated to $WORK via GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL), and .gitattributes is committed
# to the repository.

git init
git config user.email test@example.com
git config user.name 'Test User'

# Isolate the global git config to a file inside the test work directory so
# this test does not pollute the real ~/.gitconfig.
env GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=$WORK/gitconfig

# Register the driver globally (simulating: git config --global ...).
git config --global merge.gomodmerge.driver 'gomodmerge %A %O %B %P'

# Verify the local .gitattributes wires up the driver for both files.
grep 'go.mod merge=gomodmerge' .gitattributes
grep 'go.sum merge=gomodmerge' .gitattributes

# Commit the base: v1.5.1.
git add .
git commit -m base

# On a feature branch bump rsc.io/quote to v1.5.2.
git checkout -b feature
cp go.mod.feature go.mod
cp go.sum.feature go.sum
git add go.mod go.sum
git commit -m 'bump quote to v1.5.2'

# Back on main, make an independent change (bump the go directive) so
# git cannot fast-forward and must invoke the merge driver.
git checkout master
cp go.mod.main go.mod
git add go.mod
git commit -m 'bump go directive on main'

# The driver must resolve it without leaving conflict markers.
git merge feature

! grep '<<<<<<<' go.mod
! grep '<<<<<<<' go.sum

go mod verify
go list -m all
stdout '^rsc.io/quote v1.5.2$'
go run .
stdout '99 bottles of beer'

-- .gitattributes --
go.mod merge=gomodmerge
go.sum merge=gomodmerge

-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"fmt"

	"rsc.io/quote"
)

func main() {
	fmt.Println(quote.Hello())
}

-- go.mod --
module a

go 1.21.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.1

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

-- go.mod.feature --
module a

go 1.21.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.2

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

-- go.mod.main --
module a

go 1.22.0

require rsc.io/quote v1.5.1

require (
	golang.org/x/text v0.16.0 // indirect
	rsc.io/sampler v1.99.99 // indirect
)

-- go.sum --
